textByHashes.433ddd7f0170e880358bf07fc6a4f27762cddd08: Hello, I'm an eight legged mouse! Squeak squeak squeak, I like cheese, cats are bad, I'm definitely not a spider.
textByHashes.5d2f16c36ffe081fd3bad2470cf95419659dac6d: A spider? Oh no! I'm scared of spiders!
textByHashes.58fb2b2537d3ff81527862af752c84691a9d736d: Yay! I'll be an eight-legged mouse forever until I forget.
